div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 88px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/test-plan-case-implement
FEATURE_SOURCE
--test-cases TC-ID
--target-repo PATH

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Install Deps
uv sync --extra dev
test-plan package

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Locate Feature
parse PR / branch / path
repo.py locate-feature-dir
resolve feature_dir
